report.summary: Cycle 4 close Apr 3: 43 uncommitted files (up from 41 at cycle 3). 2 phantom published slugs still unfixed. 2 new learn pages on disk (Drift hack + Polkadot staking) but uncommitted. 141 TS errors (non-blocking). All 6 API routes present with caching. No new commits today.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PERSISTENT REGRESSION: 2 phantom published pages (impermanent-loss-liquidity-providing-guide-2026, hyperliquid-perp-dex-trading-guide-2026) still have NO page.tsx files on disk. These will 404 on production if deployed as-is. 4th consecutive cycle flagged.
111 total published slugs have no matching page.tsx — unchanged from cycle 3. Gap between published-pages.ts (637 slugs) and actual pages on disk (421) persists.
2 new learn pages on disk since cycle 3: drift-protocol-285m-hack-analysis-2026 (46KB) and polkadot-staking-halving-guide-2026 (48KB). Both uncommitted and untracked.
TypeScript check: 141 errors total — all in structured-data.examples.ts (reference/doc file only). Build unaffected due to ignoreBuildErrors: true in next.config.ts.
Modified but uncommitted: crypto-portfolio-rebalancing-guide-2026/page.tsx and StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx — changes from cycle 2 still pending commit.
Cannot verify live HTTP status — sandbox egress blocked to degen0x.com. Production at commit e3f63fc.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present on disk: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields.
Cache TTLs: prices (60s), fear-greed (600s), trending (300s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (no explicit TTL found).
ISR revalidation: prices (60s), fear-greed (1200s), trending (600s), market-metrics (120s), market-dominance (300s).
FALLBACK_DATA coverage: 2/6 routes (prices, market-dominance). 4 routes (fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields) will fail hard if upstream + cache both fail.
Rate limiting: 0/6 public API routes use checkRateLimit(). All routes are unprotected against abuse. Unchanged since cycle 3.
Cannot verify upstream API health (CoinGecko, DefiLlama) — sandbox egress blocked.

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest production commit: e3f63fc (Apr 2) — 4 learn guides, 8 OG images, stablecoin yield tracker, published pages update.
No new commits today (Apr 3). All 43 uncommitted files are accumulating debt.
Uncommitted breakdown: 5 modified files + 38 untracked files (up from 41 total at cycle 3).
Key modified: published-pages.ts, StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx, portfolio-rebalancing page, package-lock.json.
Key untracked: 2 new learn pages (Drift + Polkadot), 2 OG SVGs, 8+ social cards, 20+ report files, AUDIT_REPORT.md.
Build config: ignoreBuildErrors: true masks 141 TS errors. Build should still succeed but code quality debt growing.
Deploy debt: 15th consecutive escalation. No deploy trigger since e3f63fc.
WARNING: Next deploy will serve 404s for 2 phantom published slugs unless fixed first.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Delta from cycle 3: +2 uncommitted files (43 total, up from 41). No new commits. 2 new untracked learn pages appeared (Drift hack + Polkadot staking).
Content created this cycle: social drafts v23 with 2 social cards (Drift hack, Wormhole unlock). 2 learn pages (Drift, Polkadot). Multiple automated reports.
Carry-over (growing): 43 uncommitted files. 2 phantom published slugs (4th escalation). 2 new learn pages need structured data and commit. TS errors in examples file.
Content totals: 421 pages on disk (308 learn + 113 tools). 637 published slugs. 111 slug-page gap.
BLOCKER for Jefe (P0 — 15th escalation): Commit + deploy the 43 pending files. Fix phantom published slugs (impermanent-loss + hyperliquid) before deploy.
P1: Add structured data to Drift Protocol and Polkadot Staking pages before publishing.
P2: Add FALLBACK_DATA to 4 API routes (fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields).
P3: Add checkRateLimit() to all 6 public API routes.
P4: Fix 141 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts to reduce noise in type checks.
